heading: Prohibition of unspecified use
label: 625 Prohibition of unspecified use
text: Notwithstanding any other provisions of this chapter, all mining claims and mill sites or mineral rights located under the terms of this chapter or otherwise contained on the public lands as described in shall be used only for the purposes specified in and no facility or activity shall be erected or conducted thereon for other purposes.section 621 of this titlesection 621 of this title
